boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate telemetry service after prerequisite calibration evidence is attached to the activation packet?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match on site and lab/production group
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-ACR-022-P requires device group, site, release condition match
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Exact source match required per STD-ACR-022-P

final_answer: Source records show calibration CAL-ACR-022 covers DG-41B lab units at Site 18-L while activation targets DG-41B production at Site 18-P. STD-ACR-022-P requires exact match on device group, site, release condition before activation. Shared prefix insufficient. Boundary remains open. Escalate for defect resolution.
